name: 13oz Stoneware Spatter Print Mug Ruby Pink - Room Essentials™
description:
Add some joy to your morning coffee routine with this Spatter Print Mug from Room Essentials™. This coffee mug features a pink splatter pattern on a white backdrop to infuse color and whimsy into your mug collection, and it boasts a ring-shaped handle for an elegant touch. Made from stoneware, this 13-ounce mug is great for sipping hot and cold beverages — from iced tea to freshly-brewed coffee — and it's both dishwasher and microwave safe for quick cleaning and reheating.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
